entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: Arachis hypogaea L., the primary crop studied for productivity and quality improvement

entities.name: POD SIZE
entities.description: The physical dimension of the peanut pod, a key factor for productivity

entities.name: SEED SIZE
entities.description: The physical dimension of the peanut seed, a key factor for quality

entities.name: GWAS
entities.description: Genome-wide association study used to analyze pod and seed traits across multiple accessions

entities.name: PEANUT GROWING REGIONS
entities.description: The 15 geographical areas from which peanut accessions were sourced

entities.name: PLEIOTROPIC HOTSPOT
entities.description: A genomic region on chromosome B06 associated with multiple pod and seed traits

entities.name: CHROMOSOME B06
entities.description: The specific chromosome containing the pleiotropic hotspot and the AhPDS1 gene

entities.name: AHPDS1
entities.description: A peanut pod size regulator gene (PODSIZE-1, Ahy_B06g085516) involved in auxin biosynthesis

entities.name: ARABIDOPSIS THALIANA
entities.description: A model plant used for homolog comparison and overexpression studies

entities.name: YUCCA4
entities.description: An Arabidopsis thaliana gene (AtYUC4) that is a homolog of AhPDS1

entities.name: AUXIN BIOSYNTHESIS
entities.description: The biological process of producing auxin, regulated by AhPDS1

entities.name: QRTPCR
entities.description: Quantitative reverse transcriptase-polymerase chain reaction used to confirm AhPDS1 expression levels

entities.name: SUBCELLULAR LOCALIZATION
entities.description: A technique used to determine that AhPDS1 is predominantly cytoplasmic

entities.name: GUS REPORTER ASSAYS
entities.description: A technique used to identify the expression of AhPDS1 in roots, stems, leaves, flowers, and pods

entities.name: OVEREXPRESSION
entities.description: The process of increasing AhPDS1 expression in transgenic lines to observe phenotypic changes

entities.name: RICE
entities.description: A crop used for overexpression studies to test the effect of AhPDS1 on grain size

entities.name: INDOLE-3-PYRUVIC ACID PATHWAY
entities.description: The specific biochemical pathway through which AhPDS1 enhances pod, seed, and grain sizes

entities.name: MOLECULAR BREEDING
entities.description: The application of genetic targets like AhPDS1 to improve crop traits
